python3 -c "
import os
import pandas as pd

base = '/home/mrsar/protein-ag/disease-relevant non-inhibited_clean'
for dname in sorted(os.listdir(base)):
    dpath = os.path.join(base, dname)
    for subdir in os.listdir(dpath):
        fpath = os.path.join(dpath, subdir, 'data.tsv')
        if os.path.exists(fpath):
            df = pd.read_csv(fpath, sep='\t')
            ncurves = df.shape[1] // 2
            print(f'{dname}/{subdir}: {df.shape[0]} rows, {ncurves} curves, cols={list(df.columns[:4])}')
"

    x = feature_symbols(X_train.shape[1])
    c = constant_symbols(7)

    time = x[0]
    monomer = x[1]
    seed = x[2]

    rate = c[0] * monomer ** c[1]
    lag = c[2] * monomer ** c[3] / (1 + c[4] * seed)

    expression = c[5] / (1 + sp.exp(-rate * time + lag)) ** c[6]

    return evaluate_expression(

        y_train,
        X_val,
